checklist.name: Return contract
checklist.description: Executor returns { success: boolean } with proper error handling

checklist.name: Package notation
checklist.description: project-config.json uses package notation (@scope/package:executor) not relative paths

checklist.name: Cache outputs
checklist.description: project-config.json declares outputs array for cache awareness

checklist.name: Separation of concerns
checklist.description: Business logic extracted to separate lib.ts file, executor is thin orchestration

checklist.name: Async I/O
checklist.description: Uses async file I/O (fs.promises) instead of synchronous operations

checklist.name: Schema validation
checklist.description: Schema marks required fields and provides defaults

checklist.name: Documentation
checklist.description: IMPROVEMENTS.md explains cache benefits and async I/O performance gains
